summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 39 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 103 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 73 — the trend is heading the wrong direction.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 41 days past due with 39 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,658 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 15 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **88 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,462 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 29 days past due with 11 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,150 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,524 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **29 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,531 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

263 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **222 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 22 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$71,252 in payments going out this week** across 52 tasks — make sure funds are available. $24,888 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 14. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 9 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **29 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 38 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 5 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 5. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 39 overdue (oldest: 41d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 9. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 15 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **88 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 88 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 11 overdue (oldest: 29d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **24 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 9 overdue (oldest: 13d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
